reasoning: At 8x zoom, the iron keys show generally clean pixel art structure. The checkerboard bow pattern is crisp and precise — a hallmark of deliberate pixel art. Background is solid dark with no noise. However, two concerns: (1) The shank shading on the right-side large keys shows more color steps than a strict 2-3-tone palette — the orange/brown transitions have intermediate blended values that suggest AI gradient interpolation rather than hand-placed dithering. (2) Outline weight varies slightly: some edges are 1px clean, others have 2px-wide outline segments at corners without clear artistic intent, and a few interior detail lines are missing outlines entirely. No semantic failures — shapes clearly read as keys. No color bleed into background. Sub-pixel inspection shows no fractional features. Overall: a competent AI-generated pixel art asset with minor shading and outline inconsistencies, not severe enough to fail outright.
